channel.title: Post AI Sessions
channel.description: Marco and Lena debate one question about the post-AI company every other Thursday. They don't always agree. That's the point. From Post AI Company.
channel.itunes:author: Post AI Company

item.title: midjourney: 11 people, $200 million. outlier or blueprint?
item.description: Midjourney reached $200M with ~11 people. No sales. No marketing. No VC. Marco thinks it's an unrepeatable outlier. Lena thinks it's the blueprint for every post-AI company. They debate for 47 minutes and do not agree. Topics: the AI CFO that lasted 3 days, Discord as org design, why charging from day one is structural, flat orgs at scale, Block's 4,000 layoffs, and what founders should actually do on Monday morning.
item.itunes:summary: Midjourney reached $200M with ~11 people. No sales. No marketing. No VC. Marco thinks it's an unrepeatable outlier. Lena thinks it's the blueprint for every post-AI company. They debate for 47 minutes and do not agree.
